message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.iat + DataFrame.set_axis parity (frankenpandas-fga7)

Two DataFrame shape-and-access helpers matching pandas signatures:

- DataFrame::iat(row_pos: i64, col_pos: i64) → Result<Scalar>
  Matches `pd.DataFrame.iat[i, j]` two-dimensional positional
  lookup. Negative positions count from the end (pandas
  convention); out-of-range on either axis returns
  CompatibilityRejected with the offending position and bound.

- DataFrame::set_axis(labels: Vec<IndexLabel>, axis: usize)
  → Result<Self>
  Matches `pd.DataFrame.set_axis(labels, axis=0|1)`. axis=0 replaces
  the row Index; axis=1 stringifies labels and replaces column
  names (resetting column_multiindex since the axis identity
  changed). Length mismatch returns LengthMismatch; unknown axis
  returns CompatibilityRejected.

Seven tests: iat positional + negative + out-of-bounds, set_axis
row + col + wrong-length + invalid-axis.

Co-lands frankenpandas-svwe (set_axis).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
